news.headline: Saga Communications, Inc. (Nasdaq: SGA) updates shareholders on strategic plan before March 11 earnings call.
news.summary: In Grosse Pointe Farms, Michigan, on March 07, 2025, Saga Communications, Inc. (Nasdaq: SGA) shared an update on its strategic plan execution with shareholders. The company, referred to as Saga, announced this information ahead of its earnings call scheduled for March 11, 2025.

news.headline: Inventor from California creates RAGE QUIT stress ball for gamers, designed to endure impact.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from San Juan Capistrano, California, shared their inspiration for creating the RAGE QUIT, a modified stress ball tailored for video gamers. The inventor aimed to develop a durable product that could withstand impact if thrown during intense gaming sessions. This innovative design provides a secure option for gamers seeking a release for their frustrations.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: Uncertainty is difficult for all parts of the economy.
Venezuela warns the US that it may reject migrants over oil license - WSJ.
Stocks face worst week in months amid concern over Trump's tariffs impacting economic growth and trade partnerships.
news.summary: Concerns are rising among investors regarding the impact of tariffs on the United States' leading trading allies and their potential repercussions on economic growth.

news.headline: Jerome H. Powell emphasizes Fed's patience on rate adjustments due to Trump's uncertain policies.
news.summary: Jerome H. Powell has emphasized the Federal Reserve's commitment to distinguishing between important information and distractions, amid fluctuating statements from the President regarding tariffs.

news.headline: FDA approved Vertex's Journavx for acute pain - first new pain med in 20 years. Optum Rx places it in higher-cost Tier 3.
news.summary: In January, Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:VRTX) received approval from the FDA for Journavx, a non-opioid oral pain signal inhibitor designed for acute pain. This approval signifies a significant milestone as it introduces a new class of pain medication for the first time in over two decades, providing an alternative to traditional opioid treatments. According to the February Formulary Update, Journavx has been categorized under Tier 3 in Optum Rx Premium and Select Formularies. It is currently undergoing further assessment by the Optum Rx National Pharmacy & Therapeutics Committee to determine its clinical value and safety. It's notable that drugs in Tier 3 usually have more affordable alternatives in Tier 1 or 2.Optum Rx, the pharmacy benefit manager that is a subsidiary of UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH), is overseeing this assessment process. For the complete story, please visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: there is a high level of uncertainty around tariffs.
Fed's Kugler: It is possible that we'll see more persistent inflation due to policies.
Fed's Kugler: There reason to believe that, potentially, there could be more persistent inflation.
Cardano, XRP, and Solana drop after White House clarifies Trump's crypto reserve plan; Cardano at $0.845 (-3.7%), Solana at $145.11 (+1.1%), XRP at $2.47 (-4.9%).
news.summary: ADA, XRP, and SOL experienced declines on Friday following comments from a top White House aide regarding President Trump's mention of a broad crypto reserve. ADA dropped by 3.7% to $0.845, XRP fell by 4.9% to $2.47, while SOL saw a slight increase of 1.1% to $145.11. White House Crypto czar David Sacks indicated that the list of tokens mentioned might not represent a concrete plan but rather an illustration of top market-cap assets in anticipation of the White House Crypto Summit. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Fed's Kugler: I don't expect government job cuts to show up suddenly.
Fed's Kugler: Wage gain moderation has helped lower inflation.
Fed's Kugler: I am watching very closely for any sudden job market changes.
Inventor from Scottsdale, Arizona creates Sol Spin lounge chair for tanning, eliminates hassle of repositioning.
news.summary: In March 7, 2025, a resident from Scottsdale, Arizona shared their motivation in creating the Sol Spin, an automatic mechanism that adjusts your lounge chair to face the sun for optimal tanning. The inventor aimed to streamline the tanning process and stated that their invention boosts tanning results while removing the need for continuous repositioning.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: I am not that worried about small uptick in unemployment rate.

Analyst predicts Viavi Solutions will see sustainable growth in Telco & Optical markets, upgraded to Buy with $14 price forecast. Sales in NE segment rose 15% YoY and 26% QoQ in December quarter. Total revenues and NE segment revenue guidance raised for Q3.
news.summary: Analyst Mike Genovese has upgraded Viavi Solutions (NASDAQ:VIAV) from Neutral to Buy, setting a price forecast of $14. This shift comes as Viavi's Network Enablement (NE) instruments business has shown significant growth, with segment sales up 15% year-over-year and 26% sequentially in the December quarter. Genovese believes this growth is sustainable, projecting continued strong momentum in the upcoming quarters. Viavi has raised its guidance for total revenues and NE segment revenue for the third quarter, surpassing typical seasonal trends. The NE segment is poised for further expansion.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: Hiring remains above the break even level.
Fed's Kugler: The February jobs number was a solid number.
February jobs report indicates modest hiring, DOGE job cuts, Trump tariffs. Fed Chair Powell deems labor market 'solid,' S&P 500 rebounds.
news.summary: In February, there was a slight increase in employment as indicated in the latest jobs report. The month saw the beginning of reductions in DOGE employment opportunities and the implementation of Trump tariffs by the middle of the month. Despite this, Federal Reserve Chair Powell described the labor market as stable. The S&P 500 experienced a rebound during this period, reflecting some positivity in the market.

news.headline: Equities.com adds Nidhi Chadda from Enzo Advisors as Partner and Guest Contributor ahead of International Women's Day 2025.
news.summary: Renowned sustainability and impact investment expert, Nidhi Chadda, has joined Equities.com just in time for International Women's Day on March 7, 2025. This leading financial media outlet is excited to welcome Chadda as a Partner and Guest Contributor. This collaboration highlights Equities.com's commitment to providing valuable insights and showcasing diverse voices in the finance industry. Chadda's expertise in sustainability will bring a fresh perspective to the platform, benefiting the audience of over 1 million readers.

news.headline: U.S. adds 151,000 jobs in February, up from 143,000 in January. Unemployment rate rises to 4.1%.
news.summary: In February, employers in the United States increased their workforce by adding 151,000 jobs, showing an improvement from the 143,000 jobs added in January. However, the unemployment rate also saw a slight increase, rising to 4.1 percent.

news.headline: Flatiron Realty Capital secures $1 billion for luxury single-family homes, brokers, and mortgage loan originators nationwide.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Flatiron Realty Capital, LLC, a prominent private equity firm focusing on real estate lending, revealed the completion of securing a total of $1 billion in credit facilities. This substantial amount is intended to support and enhance the company's expansion efforts.

news.headline: Analyst: Bitcoin's record highs typically coincide with US Dollar Index drops. Coutts says DXY dips lead to BTC peaks.
news.summary: According to the chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts from Real Vision, decreases in the DXY have historically been associated with reaching new all-time highs in Bitcoin prices.

news.headline: Celebrate International Women's Day with 35% off Tapping Toys at Honey Play Box. Exclusive 48-Hour Flash Sale in CHINO, Calif.
news.summary: In honor of International Women's Day on March 8th, Honey Play Box is hosting an exclusive 48-hour flash sale in Chino, Calif., starting on March 7, 2025. The event aims to celebrate strength and self-love, highlighting the values of resilience and individuality that represent women across the globe. This limited-time sale offers a chance for customers to embrace the spirit of empowerment and enjoy special discounts on a wide range of products. Don't miss this opportunity to join the celebration of women's achievements and affirmations of self-worth!

news.headline: Six Hicks Thomas LLP attorneys named to Lawdragon’s 500 Leading Energy Lawyers 2025 edition. Partners include Courtney Ervin, Robin Harrison, Gregg Laswell, Paul Mitchell, Allen Rustay, and Katherine Kunz. Recognized as key advisors for energy companies and financiers.
news.summary: Six attorneys from Hicks Thomas LLP in Houston have been recognized in Lawdragon’s 500 Leading Energy Lawyers list for the 2025 edition. Partners Courtney E. Ervin, Robin L. Harrison, Gregg C. Laswell, Paul L. Mitchell, Allen H. Rustay, and Katherine Kunz are among the honorees. Lawdragon highlights them as the top choice for energy companies and financiers for various important issues. The Texas-based attorneys and their firm are considered crucial for the energy sector, which is a key contributor to the state’s economy.

news.headline: Consumer Watchdog urges Commissioner Lara to disqualify State Farm's 22% rate hike request citing new damning evidence. Characters: 100
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, a consumer advocacy group sent a letter to California's Insurance Commissioner, Ricardo Lara, presenting data opposing State Farm's request for a significant 22% emergency rate increase. The submission included a video recording of a State Farm executive.

news.headline: Trump's Crypto Czar Sacks: Crypto exchanges will be attending the White House summit.
50/50 Women on Boards launches campaign to feature 50 women for corporate boards, aiming to achieve gender parity.
news.summary: In an innovative move to address board gender disparity, a pioneering initiative is being launched with the aim of highlighting qualified female candidates for corporate boards. Known as 50/50 Women on Boards™ (50/50WOB), this prominent global nonprofit organization is dedicated to promoting gender equality within corporate boardrooms. The initiative's focus is on accelerating the achievement of equal representation by emphasizing the importance of having board-ready women. The organization's efforts are geared towards driving the global movement for gender balance on corporate boards.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor creates T-KUP accessory to stabilize beverages, ideal for outdoor activities.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Scottsdale, Arizona, expressed the inspiration behind creating the T-KUP, a product designed to stabilize cans of beer, soft drinks, or glasses of wine during outdoor activities. The invention aims to provide convenience during picnics, swimming, camping, and more. The article did not specify the inventor's name or the exact funding tied to the invention.

news.headline: 33 counterparties take $136.305b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
EastGroup Properties declares 181st consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $1.40 per share on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: In the latest announcement from EastGroup Properties (NYSE: EGP) headquartered in Jackson, Mississippi, on March 7, 2025, the company's Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.40 per share. The dividend is set to be paid out on April 15, 2025, to shareholders holding Common Stock as of the record date on March 31.

news.headline: Generational Group helps SafetyCom, Inc. sell to Mobile Communications America in a deal that closed on Jan 29, 2025.
news.summary: A recent announcement states that Generational Group successfully facilitated the sale of SafetyCom, Inc. to Mobile Communications America. The deal was finalized on January 29, 2025. SafetyCom, Inc., based in North Little Rock, Arkansas, has been operating for 28 years and is known for offering Whelen Mass Notification Systems in the Southwest region. Notably, the company has had an exclusive partnership with RapidWar for nearly 14 years.

news.headline: BAB, Inc. declared $0.01 per share cash distribution for shareholders, payable on April 14, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, BAB, Inc. (OTCQB: BABB) based in Deerfield, Illinois, declared a quarterly distribution of $0.01 per share. The distribution will be payable on April 14, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 24, 2025.

news.headline: Henning Cheese excels at 2025 US Championship Cheese Contest, winning multiple first place honors and a top 20 finish.
news.summary: At the 2025 United States Championship Cheese Contest, Henning Cheese from KIEL, Wis., stood out with their Onion & Chive Cheddar being named in the top 20 overall. The company also received multiple first place awards, showcasing their excellence in cheese making. This achievement highlights their dedication to producing high-quality products, further solidifying their reputation in the industry.

news.headline: OsteoCentric Technologies secures investment from UH Haslam Sports Innovation Center to drive orthopedic sports medicine innovation.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on March 7, 2025, OsteoCentric Technologies is leading the way in revolutionizing Orthopedic MIS bone preservation technology. The company is part of a larger effort within the industry to combat the widespread problem of bone damage. OsteoCentric Technologies is focused on developing cutting-edge solutions to this issue.

news.headline: Tech jobs in US labor market rise in Feb, while other hiring indicators decline, per CompTIA report.
news.summary: The most recent employment data indicates a complex picture for the labor market, with potential signs of anxiety. In February, technology employment in the U.S. saw growth, contrasting with a decline in other crucial indicators of hiring activity. CompTIA, a prominent global provider, highlighted this trend. The fluctuations suggest uncertainties and challenges in the labor market. These mixed signals underscore the need for continued monitoring and analysis to fully grasp the current employment landscape.

news.headline: Trump's Crypto Czar Sacks: A bitcoin reserve should have been done a long time ago.
Trump's Crypto Czar Sacks: The crypto summit today is to hear from industry leaders.
Waters Corp CEO Udit Batra to speak at Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference on March 11, 2025 at 10:00AM.
news.summary: In Milford, Massachusetts, on March 7, 2025, Waters Corporation revealed that Udit Batra, Ph.D., the company's President and CEO, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Leerink Partners Global Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, March 11th, 2025, starting at 10:00 AM. It is of note that Waters Corporation is listed on the NYSE as WAT.

news.headline: Inventor from Phoenix develops unmanned water delivery device for forest protection. (PBT-4069)
news.summary: A resident of Phoenix, Arizona shared his motivation behind creating a device aimed at safeguarding forests by efficiently distributing eco-friendly chemicals. The device would address various issues such as combating fires, managing termites and tree diseases, and dispensing liquid fertilizer. The inventor's innovative solution is designed to provide effective forest protection measures.

news.headline: BCC Research launches new Academic Membership tier for universities, providing market insights.
news.summary: BCC Research has introduced a new upgraded academic membership tier on March 7, 2025, in Boston. This tier is designed to provide universities across the globe with extensive market insights. As a leading market intelligence and research organization, BCC Research aims to empower academic institutions with specialized products and services. This move signifies a commitment to enhancing the educational sector's access to valuable information. The upgraded tier offers universities access to a wide range of comprehensive market insights, enabling them to stay informed and make well-informed decisions. This initiative is part of BCC Research's efforts to support academic research and knowledge dissemination.

Motorsport Games Inc. wins summary judgment in dispute with Innovate 2 Corp. in U.S. Court, Feb 26, 2025. Court favors Motorsport and defendants in case No. 1:21-cv-165-SB.
news.summary: Motorsport Games Inc. (NASDAQ: MSGM), a leading racing game developer and publisher, achieved a significant legal victory on February 26, 2025. The U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware ruled in their favor in a case brought by Innovate 2 Corp. The court granted a summary judgment motion for Motorsport Games Inc., along with the company's former CEO and Executive Chairman, former CFO, and the Manager of Driven Lifestyle Group LLC. The case, titled Innovate 2 Corp., Motorsport Games Inc., et al., No. 1:21-cv-165-SB, was resolved in favor of the defendants. This decision marks a milestone for the company and key individuals involved.
